channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tinubu Rejects Senators' Request for Automatic Re-election Tickets, Upholds Governors' Influence
item.description: On April 23, 2026, President Bola Tinubu met with the leadership of the Senate at the Presidential Villa in Abuja to discuss critical matters affecting the legislative body. During the meeting, which ...

item.title: Ticket and seating information for Charlie Puth's 'Whatever's Clever!' Manila concert
item.description: Charlie Puth is set to perform in Manila as part of his 'Whatever's Clever!' tour, and fans are eager to know the details on tickets and seating arrangements. The event will take place in 2026, and th...

item.title: ADB commits $3.67bn to Pakistan in 2025, focusing on fiscal reforms, women’s inclusion and mineral sector development
item.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) significantly increased its engagement with Pakistan in 2025, committing $3.672 billion, marking a 22% rise compared to the previous year. According to the bank’s Annu...

item.title: Cultural Events in Kenya That Enhance Social Well-being and Unity
item.description: Kenya is known for its rich cultural heritage, with over 70 diverse tribes, each contributing to the country’s national identity. Cultural events play a significant role in promoting social well-being...

item.title: Forest fire burns part of Sierra Madre in Laguna; tourism suspended in Benguet due to similar incidents
item.description: Isang forest fire ang tumama sa bahagi ng Sierra Madre mountain range sa Kalayaan, Laguna noong Martes ng hapon. Ayon sa mga bumbero, nagsimula ang sunog bandang alas-4 ng hapon at tumagal ng humigit-...

item.title: Teodoro Challenges China's Accusations of Garbage Dumping in West Philippine Sea
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. of the Philippines recently dismissed China's claims that the country is dumping garbage in the West Philippine Sea, calling the accusations baseless. During an ...

item.title: NDMA warns of intense heatwave across Pakistan until May 5; emergency measures activated
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has issued a nationwide weather alert warning of a severe heatwave affecting Karachi and several other regions of Pakistan until May 5. Through its Na...

item.title: Astronomers use AI and GPUs to analyze massive space telescope data
item.description: NASA is set to launch the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope in September 2026, eight months ahead of schedule. The telescope is expected to produce 20,000 terabytes of data over its operational life, ...

item.title: Review of Bolu Essien’s Girls’ Hostel explores secondary school power dynamics, bullying and rivalry
item.description: Girls’ Hostel by Bolu Essien is a gritty and realistic drama series that takes a close look at the social hierarchy and power struggles within secondary school life. The story centres on Ufuoma, a new...

item.title: Majority of Democratic Senators Support Measures to Restrict Military Sales to Israel
item.description: In a significant development in U.S. politics, over 75% of Democratic Senators supported resolutions aimed at blocking military aid to Israel. The resolutions, introduced by Senator Bernie Sanders, so...

item.title: Proposal submitted to FIFA suggesting Italy replace Iran at upcoming World Cup
item.description: Reports don show say a proposal linked to an envoy associated with Donald Trump don reach FIFA leadership, suggesting make Iran position for the upcoming FIFA World Cup dey replaced with Italy. The re...

item.title: Recognising Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander contributions to Australia’s war history on ANZAC Day
item.description: Each year on ANZAC Day, Australians come together to remember those who served in wars, conflicts and peacekeeping missions. However, the stories of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander servicemen an...

item.title: Kenya Urges Innovative Climate Financing to Boost Private Investment
item.description: Kenya has made a strong call for more innovative and high-integrity climate financing mechanisms to attract private capital for climate action in developing countries. Environment Cabinet Secretary De...

item.title: African Leaders, International Visits, and Social Unrest Across the Continent
item.description: On 23 April 2026, Pope Leo XIV visited Equatorial Guinea as part of his 11-day African tour, celebrating Mass before an audience of around 100,000 people, including President Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mba...

item.title: Federal government commits $200 million to develop Nova Scotia spaceport amid concerns over limited infrastructure
item.description: The Canadian federal government has announced a $200 million investment over 10 years to support the development of Spaceport Nova Scotia, a proposed commercial launch site near Canso, Nova Scotia. Th...

item.title: Commission reports Sh125 billion economic losses from October 29 post-election violence in Tanzania
item.description: Tanzania’s Commission of Inquiry into the post-election violence that occurred on October 29, 2025 has revealed that the country suffered an estimated total economic loss of Sh125 billion. The finding...

item.title: Tanzania allocates 99.9bn/- budget focusing on Union awareness and environmental sustainability for 2026/27
item.description: The Minister of State in the Vice-President’s Office responsible for Union and Environment, Engineer Hamad Yusuf Masauni, has presented a 99.9bn/- budget for the 2026/27 financial year in the National...

item.title: U.S. Senate adopts budget measure to fund ICE and Border Patrol amid DHS shutdown
item.description: The U.S. Senate has taken initial steps to reopen the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) by approving a budget resolution that specifically funds ICE and Border Patrol, despite Democratic oppositio...

item.title: Lamine Yamal suffers hamstring injury, likely to return for World Cup
item.description: Barcelona young star, Lamine Yamal, don suffer hamstring injury for him left leg during their 1-0 win against Celta Vigo for La Liga on Wednesday. The injury happen after Yamal score penalty to help h...

item.title: Jodi Kantor on helping young people navigate careers with purpose and realism
item.description: In this interview, New York Times investigative journalist Jodi Kantor discusses her motivation for writing How to Start, a practical guide aimed primarily at young people struggling to find meaningfu...
